revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk| 317,000+ }} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Dmbox/styles.css}} {{Mbox templates (small)}} This is the {{tl|Dmbox}} (['''D''']isambiguation footer ['''m''']essage ['''box''']) [[WP:MTM|metatemplate]]. It is used to build [[WP:disambiguation|disambiguation]] and [[Wikipedia:set index article|set index article]] message boxes, such as {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Ship index}}. This template works similarly to {{tl|Ambox}} and mostly uses the same parameters. The main differences are that this box uses the disambiguation style and only has two "type" settings. === Usage === Simple usage example: {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} Complex example: {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg|class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg||class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} Some other parameter combinations: {{dmbox | text = No type and no image given ('''default''') }} {{dmbox | image = none | text = No type and '''image=none''' – No image is used and the '''text''' uses the whole message box area. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = type = setindex
imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = This article includes a [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Ships/Guidelines#Index pages|list of ships]] with the same or similar names. If an [[Special:Whatlinkshere/{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|internal link]] for a specific ship referred you to this page, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended ship article, if one exists. }} === Parameters === List of all parameters: {{dmbox | type = disambig / setindex | image = none / [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | imageright = [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | text = The message body text. | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} / true }} {{Para|type}} :If no {{Para|type}} parameter is given the template defaults to type {{code|disambig}}. :{{code|disambig}} = Makes it so the {{tl|disambig editintro}} is displayed when editing a page with this template on. (Means that this template internally sets the CSS id "disambigbox". The id is used by the javascript in [[MediaWiki:Common.js]] to determine if a page is a disambiguation page or not.) And adds [[:Category:All disambiguation pages]] and [[:Category:All article disambiguation pages]]. :{{code|setindex}} = Does ''not'' trigger the {{tl|disambig editintro}} when editing a page. (Because this instead sets the CSS id "setindexbox".) And adds [[:Category:All set index articles]]. {{Para|nocat}} :{{code|true}} = [[Wikipedia:Category suppression|Stops this template from categorizing]]. Useful for tests and demonstrations. Dmbox templates should forward{{when defined as}} {{para|nocat}}, so they too have the option to suppress categories. Thus, it is recommended that Dmbox templates always add something similar to this: ::nocat = {{{nocat|}}} {{Para|image}} :''[No parameter]'' = If no {{Para|image}} parameter is given, the template uses the default {{para|disambig}} or {{para|setindex}} image, depending on the {{Para|type}} parameter. :''An image'' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::image = [[File:Schooner.svg|30px|link=|alt=]] :none = Means that no image is used. {{Para|imageright}} :'''No parameter''' = If no {{Para|imageright}} parameter is given then no image is shown on the right side. :'''An image''' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::imageright = [[File:Nuvola apps bookcase.png|40px|alt=Books icon]] :'''Anything''' = Any other object that you want to show on the right side. {{Para|text}} :The message body text. This message box has ''italic'' text as default, thus no need to manually set that. === Technical details === If you need to use special characters in the text parameter then you need to escape them like this: {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} For more technical details see the [[Template talk:Dmbox|talk page]]. Since this template works almost exactly like {{tl|ambox}}, {{tl|tmbox}}, {{tl|imbox}}, {{tl|cmbox}} and {{tl|ombox}} their talk pages and related pages might also contain more details. ===See also=== {{Mbox templates see also}} Other pages: * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]], which includes a section explaining [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation#Set index articles|set index articles]]. * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Disambiguation]] * {{tl|Disambiguation}}, the generic disambiguation message box. * {{tl|Set index article}}, the generic set index article message box. {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Disambiguation message boxes| ]] [[Category:Set index article templates| ]] [[Category:Mbox and messagebox templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk| 317,000+ }} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Dmbox/styles.css}} {{Mbox templates (small)}} This is the {{tl|Dmbox}} (['''D''']isambiguation footer ['''m''']essage ['''box''']) [[WP:MTM|metatemplate]]. It is used to build [[WP:disambiguation|disambiguation]] and [[Wikipedia:set index article|set index article]] message boxes, such as {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Ship index}}. This template works similarly to {{tl|Ambox}} and mostly uses the same parameters. The main differences are that this box uses the disambiguation style and only has two "type" settings. === Usage === Simple usage example: {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} Complex example: {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg|class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg||class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} Some other parameter combinations: {{dmbox | text = No type and no image given ('''default''') }} {{dmbox | image = none | text = No type and '''image=none''' – No image is used and the '''text''' uses the whole message box area. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = type = setindex
imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = This article includes a [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Ships/Guidelines#Index pages|list of ships]] with the same or similar names. If an [[Special:Whatlinkshere/{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|internal link]] for a specific ship referred you to this page, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended ship article, if one exists. }} === Parameters === List of all parameters: {{dmbox | type = disambig / setindex | image = none / [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | imageright = [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | text = The message body text. | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} / true }} {{Para|type}} :If no {{Para|type}} parameter is given the template defaults to type {{code|disambig}}. :{{code|disambig}} = Makes it so the {{tl|disambig editintro}} is displayed when editing a page with this template on. (Means that this template internally sets the CSS id "disambigbox". The id is used by the javascript in [[MediaWiki:Common.js]] to determine if a page is a disambiguation page or not.) And adds [[:Category:All disambiguation pages]] and [[:Category:All article disambiguation pages]]. :{{code|setindex}} = Does ''not'' trigger the {{tl|disambig editintro}} when editing a page. (Because this instead sets the CSS id "setindexbox".) And adds [[:Category:All set index articles]]. {{Para|nocat}} :{{code|true}} = [[Wikipedia:Category suppression|Stops this template from categorizing]]. Useful for tests and demonstrations. Dmbox templates should forward{{when defined as}} {{para|nocat}}, so they too have the option to suppress categories. Thus, it is recommended that Dmbox templates always add something similar to this: ::nocat = {{{nocat|}}} {{Para|image}} :''[No parameter]'' = If no {{Para|image}} parameter is given, the template uses the default {{para|disambig}} or {{para|setindex}} image, depending on the {{Para|type}} parameter. :''An image'' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::image = [[File:Schooner.svg|30px|link=|alt=]] :none = Means that no image is used. {{Para|imageright}} :'''No parameter''' = If no {{Para|imageright}} parameter is given then no image is shown on the right side. :'''An image''' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::imageright = [[File:Nuvola apps bookcase.png|40px|alt=Books icon]] :'''Anything''' = Any other object that you want to show on the right side. {{Para|text}} :The message body text. This message box has ''italic'' text as default, thus no need to manually set that. === Technical details === If you need to use special characters in the text parameter then you need to escape them like this: {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} For more technical details see the [[Template talk:Dmbox|talk page]]. Since this template works almost exactly like {{tl|ambox}}, {{tl|tmbox}}, {{tl|imbox}}, {{tl|cmbox}} and {{tl|ombox}} their talk pages and related pages might also contain more details. ===See also=== {{Mbox templates see also}} Other pages: * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]], which includes a section explaining [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation#Set index articles|set index articles]]. * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Disambiguation]] * {{tl|Disambiguation}}, the generic disambiguation message box. * {{tl|Set index article}}, the generic set index article message box. {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Disambiguation message boxes| ]] [[Category:Set index article templates| ]] [[Category:Mbox and messagebox templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk| 317,000+ }} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Dmbox/styles.css}} {{Mbox templates (small)}} This is the {{tl|Dmbox}} (['''D''']isambiguation footer ['''m''']essage ['''box''']) [[WP:MTM|metatemplate]]. It is used to build [[WP:disambiguation|disambiguation]] and [[Wikipedia:set index article|set index article]] message boxes, such as {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Ship index}}. This template works similarly to {{tl|Ambox}} and mostly uses the same parameters. The main differences are that this box uses the disambiguation style and only has two "type" settings. === Usage === Simple usage example: {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} Complex example: {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg|class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg||class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} Some other parameter combinations: {{dmbox | text = No type and no image given ('''default''') }} {{dmbox | image = none | text = No type and '''image=none''' – No image is used and the '''text''' uses the whole message box area. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = type = setindex
imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = This article includes a [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Ships/Guidelines#Index pages|list of ships]] with the same or similar names. If an [[Special:Whatlinkshere/{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|internal link]] for a specific ship referred you to this page, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended ship article, if one exists. }} === Parameters === List of all parameters: {{dmbox | type = disambig / setindex | image = none / [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | imageright = [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | text = The message body text. | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} / true }} {{Para|type}} :If no {{Para|type}} parameter is given the template defaults to type {{code|disambig}}. :{{code|disambig}} = Makes it so the {{tl|disambig editintro}} is displayed when editing a page with this template on. (Means that this template internally sets the CSS id "disambigbox". The id is used by the javascript in [[MediaWiki:Common.js]] to determine if a page is a disambiguation page or not.) And adds [[:Category:All disambiguation pages]] and [[:Category:All article disambiguation pages]]. :{{code|setindex}} = Does ''not'' trigger the {{tl|disambig editintro}} when editing a page. (Because this instead sets the CSS id "setindexbox".) And adds [[:Category:All set index articles]]. {{Para|nocat}} :{{code|true}} = [[Wikipedia:Category suppression|Stops this template from categorizing]]. Useful for tests and demonstrations. Dmbox templates should forward{{when defined as}} {{para|nocat}}, so they too have the option to suppress categories. Thus, it is recommended that Dmbox templates always add something similar to this: ::nocat = {{{nocat|}}} {{Para|image}} :''[No parameter]'' = If no {{Para|image}} parameter is given, the template uses the default {{para|disambig}} or {{para|setindex}} image, depending on the {{Para|type}} parameter. :''An image'' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::image = [[File:Schooner.svg|30px|link=|alt=]] :none = Means that no image is used. {{Para|imageright}} :'''No parameter''' = If no {{Para|imageright}} parameter is given then no image is shown on the right side. :'''An image''' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::imageright = [[File:Nuvola apps bookcase.png|40px|alt=Books icon]] :'''Anything''' = Any other object that you want to show on the right side. {{Para|text}} :The message body text. This message box has ''italic'' text as default, thus no need to manually set that. === Technical details === If you need to use special characters in the text parameter then you need to escape them like this: {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} For more technical details see the [[Template talk:Dmbox|talk page]]. Since this template works almost exactly like {{tl|ambox}}, {{tl|tmbox}}, {{tl|imbox}}, {{tl|cmbox}} and {{tl|ombox}} their talk pages and related pages might also contain more details. ===See also=== {{Mbox templates see also}} Other pages: * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]], which includes a section explaining [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation#Set index articles|set index articles]]. * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Disambiguation]] * {{tl|Disambiguation}}, the generic disambiguation message box. * {{tl|Set index article}}, the generic set index article message box. {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Disambiguation message boxes| ]] [[Category:Set index article templates| ]] [[Category:Mbox and messagebox templates]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk| 317,000+ }} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Dmbox/styles.css}} {{Mbox templates (small)}} This is the {{tl|Dmbox}} (['''D''']isambiguation footer ['''m''']essage ['''box''']) [[WP:MTM|metatemplate]]. It is used to build [[WP:disambiguation|disambiguation]] and [[Wikipedia:set index article|set index article]] message boxes, such as {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Ship index}}. This template works similarly to {{tl|Ambox}} and mostly uses the same parameters. The main differences are that this box uses the disambiguation style and only has two "type" settings. === Usage === Simple usage example: {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} Complex example: {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg|class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg||class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} Some other parameter combinations: {{dmbox | text = No type and no image given ('''default''') }} {{dmbox | image = none | text = No type and '''image=none''' – No image is used and the '''text''' uses the whole message box area. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = type = setindex
imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = This article includes a [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Ships/Guidelines#Index pages|list of ships]] with the same or similar names. If an [[Special:Whatlinkshere/{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|internal link]] for a specific ship referred you to this page, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended ship article, if one exists. }} === Parameters === List of all parameters: {{dmbox | type = disambig / setindex | image = none / [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | imageright = [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | text = The message body text. | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} / true }} {{Para|type}} :If no {{Para|type}} parameter is given the template defaults to type {{code|disambig}}. :{{code|disambig}} = Makes it so the {{tl|disambig editintro}} is displayed when editing a page with this template on. (Means that this template internally sets the CSS id "disambigbox". The id is used by the javascript in [[MediaWiki:Common.js]] to determine if a page is a disambiguation page or not.) And adds [[:Category:All disambiguation pages]] and [[:Category:All article disambiguation pages]]. :{{code|setindex}} = Does ''not'' trigger the {{tl|disambig editintro}} when editing a page. (Because this instead sets the CSS id "setindexbox".) And adds [[:Category:All set index articles]]. {{Para|nocat}} :{{code|true}} = [[Wikipedia:Category suppression|Stops this template from categorizing]]. Useful for tests and demonstrations. Dmbox templates should forward{{when defined as}} {{para|nocat}}, so they too have the option to suppress categories. Thus, it is recommended that Dmbox templates always add something similar to this: ::nocat = {{{nocat|}}} {{Para|image}} :''[No parameter]'' = If no {{Para|image}} parameter is given, the template uses the default {{para|disambig}} or {{para|setindex}} image, depending on the {{Para|type}} parameter. :''An image'' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::image = [[File:Schooner.svg|30px|link=|alt=]] :none = Means that no image is used. {{Para|imageright}} :'''No parameter''' = If no {{Para|imageright}} parameter is given then no image is shown on the right side. :'''An image''' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::imageright = [[File:Nuvola apps bookcase.png|40px|alt=Books icon]] :'''Anything''' = Any other object that you want to show on the right side. {{Para|text}} :The message body text. This message box has ''italic'' text as default, thus no need to manually set that. === Technical details === If you need to use special characters in the text parameter then you need to escape them like this: {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} For more technical details see the [[Template talk:Dmbox|talk page]]. Since this template works almost exactly like {{tl|ambox}}, {{tl|tmbox}}, {{tl|imbox}}, {{tl|cmbox}} and {{tl|ombox}} their talk pages and related pages might also contain more details. ===See also=== {{Mbox templates see also}} Other pages: * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]], which includes a section explaining [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation#Set index articles|set index articles]]. * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Disambiguation]] * {{tl|Disambiguation}}, the generic disambiguation message box. * {{tl|Set index article}}, the generic set index article message box. {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Disambiguation message boxes| ]] [[Category:Set index article templates| ]] [[Category:Mbox and messagebox templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk| 317,000+ }} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Dmbox/styles.css}} {{Mbox templates (small)}} This is the {{tl|Dmbox}} (['''D''']isambiguation footer ['''m''']essage ['''box''']) [[WP:MTM|metatemplate]]. It is used to build [[WP:disambiguation|disambiguation]] and [[Wikipedia:set index article|set index article]] message boxes, such as {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Ship index}}. This template works similarly to {{tl|Ambox}} and mostly uses the same parameters. The main differences are that this box uses the disambiguation style and only has two "type" settings. === Usage === Simple usage example: {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} Complex example: {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg|class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg||class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} Some other parameter combinations: {{dmbox | text = No type and no image given ('''default''') }} {{dmbox | image = none | text = No type and '''image=none''' – No image is used and the '''text''' uses the whole message box area. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = type = setindex
imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = This article includes a [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Ships/Guidelines#Index pages|list of ships]] with the same or similar names. If an [[Special:Whatlinkshere/{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|internal link]] for a specific ship referred you to this page, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended ship article, if one exists. }} === Parameters === List of all parameters: {{dmbox | type = disambig / setindex | image = none / [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | imageright = [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | text = The message body text. | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} / true }} {{Para|type}} :If no {{Para|type}} parameter is given the template defaults to type {{code|disambig}}. :{{code|disambig}} = Makes it so the {{tl|disambig editintro}} is displayed when editing a page with this template on. (Means that this template internally sets the CSS id "disambigbox". The id is used by the javascript in [[MediaWiki:Common.js]] to determine if a page is a disambiguation page or not.) And adds [[:Category:All disambiguation pages]] and [[:Category:All article disambiguation pages]]. :{{code|setindex}} = Does ''not'' trigger the {{tl|disambig editintro}} when editing a page. (Because this instead sets the CSS id "setindexbox".) And adds [[:Category:All set index articles]]. {{Para|nocat}} :{{code|true}} = [[Wikipedia:Category suppression|Stops this template from categorizing]]. Useful for tests and demonstrations. Dmbox templates should forward{{when defined as}} {{para|nocat}}, so they too have the option to suppress categories. Thus, it is recommended that Dmbox templates always add something similar to this: ::nocat = {{{nocat|}}} {{Para|image}} :''[No parameter]'' = If no {{Para|image}} parameter is given, the template uses the default {{para|disambig}} or {{para|setindex}} image, depending on the {{Para|type}} parameter. :''An image'' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::image = [[File:Schooner.svg|30px|link=|alt=]] :none = Means that no image is used. {{Para|imageright}} :'''No parameter''' = If no {{Para|imageright}} parameter is given then no image is shown on the right side. :'''An image''' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::imageright = [[File:Nuvola apps bookcase.png|40px|alt=Books icon]] :'''Anything''' = Any other object that you want to show on the right side. {{Para|text}} :The message body text. This message box has ''italic'' text as default, thus no need to manually set that. === Technical details === If you need to use special characters in the text parameter then you need to escape them like this: {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} For more technical details see the [[Template talk:Dmbox|talk page]]. Since this template works almost exactly like {{tl|ambox}}, {{tl|tmbox}}, {{tl|imbox}}, {{tl|cmbox}} and {{tl|ombox}} their talk pages and related pages might also contain more details. ===See also=== {{Mbox templates see also}} Other pages: * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]], which includes a section explaining [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation#Set index articles|set index articles]]. * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Disambiguation]] * {{tl|Disambiguation}}, the generic disambiguation message box. * {{tl|Set index article}}, the generic set index article message box. {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Disambiguation message boxes| ]] [[Category:Set index article templates| ]] [[Category:Mbox and messagebox templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk| 317,000+ }} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Dmbox/styles.css}} {{Mbox templates (small)}} This is the {{tl|Dmbox}} (['''D''']isambiguation footer ['''m''']essage ['''box''']) [[WP:MTM|metatemplate]]. It is used to build [[WP:disambiguation|disambiguation]] and [[Wikipedia:set index article|set index article]] message boxes, such as {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Ship index}}. This template works similarly to {{tl|Ambox}} and mostly uses the same parameters. The main differences are that this box uses the disambiguation style and only has two "type" settings. === Usage === Simple usage example: {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} Complex example: {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg|class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg||class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} Some other parameter combinations: {{dmbox | text = No type and no image given ('''default''') }} {{dmbox | image = none | text = No type and '''image=none''' – No image is used and the '''text''' uses the whole message box area. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = type = setindex
imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = This article includes a [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Ships/Guidelines#Index pages|list of ships]] with the same or similar names. If an [[Special:Whatlinkshere/{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|internal link]] for a specific ship referred you to this page, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended ship article, if one exists. }} === Parameters === List of all parameters: {{dmbox | type = disambig / setindex | image = none / [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | imageright = [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | text = The message body text. | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} / true }} {{Para|type}} :If no {{Para|type}} parameter is given the template defaults to type {{code|disambig}}. :{{code|disambig}} = Makes it so the {{tl|disambig editintro}} is displayed when editing a page with this template on. (Means that this template internally sets the CSS id "disambigbox". The id is used by the javascript in [[MediaWiki:Common.js]] to determine if a page is a disambiguation page or not.) And adds [[:Category:All disambiguation pages]] and [[:Category:All article disambiguation pages]]. :{{code|setindex}} = Does ''not'' trigger the {{tl|disambig editintro}} when editing a page. (Because this instead sets the CSS id "setindexbox".) And adds [[:Category:All set index articles]]. {{Para|nocat}} :{{code|true}} = [[Wikipedia:Category suppression|Stops this template from categorizing]]. Useful for tests and demonstrations. Dmbox templates should forward{{when defined as}} {{para|nocat}}, so they too have the option to suppress categories. Thus, it is recommended that Dmbox templates always add something similar to this: ::nocat = {{{nocat|}}} {{Para|image}} :''[No parameter]'' = If no {{Para|image}} parameter is given, the template uses the default {{para|disambig}} or {{para|setindex}} image, depending on the {{Para|type}} parameter. :''An image'' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::image = [[File:Schooner.svg|30px|link=|alt=]] :none = Means that no image is used. {{Para|imageright}} :'''No parameter''' = If no {{Para|imageright}} parameter is given then no image is shown on the right side. :'''An image''' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::imageright = [[File:Nuvola apps bookcase.png|40px|alt=Books icon]] :'''Anything''' = Any other object that you want to show on the right side. {{Para|text}} :The message body text. This message box has ''italic'' text as default, thus no need to manually set that. === Technical details === If you need to use special characters in the text parameter then you need to escape them like this: {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} For more technical details see the [[Template talk:Dmbox|talk page]]. Since this template works almost exactly like {{tl|ambox}}, {{tl|tmbox}}, {{tl|imbox}}, {{tl|cmbox}} and {{tl|ombox}} their talk pages and related pages might also contain more details. ===See also=== {{Mbox templates see also}} Other pages: * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]], which includes a section explaining [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation#Set index articles|set index articles]]. * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Disambiguation]] * {{tl|Disambiguation}}, the generic disambiguation message box. * {{tl|Set index article}}, the generic set index article message box. {{Sandbox other| | }} [[Category:Disambiguation message boxes| ]] [[Category:Set index article templates| ]] [[Category:Mbox and messagebox templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dmbox%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk| 317,000+ }} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Dmbox/styles.css}} {{Mbox templates (small)}} This is the {{tl|Dmbox}} (['''D''']isambiguation footer ['''m''']essage ['''box''']) [[WP:MTM|metatemplate]]. It is used to build [[WP:disambiguation|disambiguation]] and [[Wikipedia:set index article|set index article]] message boxes, such as {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Ship index}}. This template works similarly to {{tl|Ambox}} and mostly uses the same parameters. The main differences are that this box uses the disambiguation style and only has two "type" settings. === Usage === Simple usage example: {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} Complex example: {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg|class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg||class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} Some other parameter combinations: {{dmbox | text = No type and no image given ('''default''') }} {{dmbox | image = none | text = No type and '''image=none''' – No image is used and the '''text''' uses the whole message box area. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = type = setindex
imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = This article includes a [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Ships/Guidelines#Index pages|list of ships]] with the same or similar names. If an [[Special:Whatlinkshere/{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|internal link]] for a specific ship referred you to this page, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended ship article, if one exists. }} === Parameters === List of all parameters: {{dmbox | type = disambig / setindex | image = none / [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | imageright = [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | text = The message body text. | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} / true }} {{Para|type}} :If no {{Para|type}} parameter is given the template defaults to type {{code|disambig}}. :{{code|disambig}} = Makes it so the {{tl|disambig editintro}} is displayed when editing a page with this template on. (Means that this template internally sets the CSS id "disambigbox". The id is used by the javascript in [[MediaWiki:Common.js]] to determine if a page is a disambiguation page or not.) And adds [[:Category:All disambiguation pages]] and [[:Category:All article disambiguation pages]]. :{{code|setindex}} = Does ''not'' trigger the {{tl|disambig editintro}} when editing a page. (Because this instead sets the CSS id "setindexbox".) And adds [[:Category:All set index articles]]. {{Para|nocat}} :{{code|true}} = [[Wikipedia:Category suppression|Stops this template from categorizing]]. Useful for tests and demonstrations. Dmbox templates should forward{{when defined as}} {{para|nocat}}, so they too have the option to suppress categories. Thus, it is recommended that Dmbox templates always add something similar to this: ::nocat = {{{nocat|}}} {{Para|image}} :''[No parameter]'' = If no {{Para|image}} parameter is given, the template uses the default {{para|disambig}} or {{para|setindex}} image, depending on the {{Para|type}} parameter. :''An image'' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::image = [[File:Schooner.svg|30px|link=|alt=]] :none = Means that no image is used. {{Para|imageright}} :'''No parameter''' = If no {{Para|imageright}} parameter is given then no image is shown on the right side. :'''An image''' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::imageright = [[File:Nuvola apps bookcase.png|40px|alt=Books icon]] :'''Anything''' = Any other object that you want to show on the right side. {{Para|text}} :The message body text. This message box has ''italic'' text as default, thus no need to manually set that. === Technical details === If you need to use special characters in the text parameter then you need to escape them like this: {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} For more technical details see the [[Template talk:Dmbox|talk page]]. Since this template works almost exactly like {{tl|ambox}}, {{tl|tmbox}}, {{tl|imbox}}, {{tl|cmbox}} and {{tl|ombox}} their talk pages and related pages might also contain more details. ===See also=== {{Mbox templates see also}} Other pages: * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]], which includes a section explaining [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation#Set index articles|set index articles]]. * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Disambiguation]] * {{tl|Disambiguation}}, the generic disambiguation message box. * {{tl|Set index article}}, the generic set index article message box. {{Sandbox other| | }} [[Category:Disambiguation message boxes| ]] [[Category:Set index article templates| ]] [[Category:Mbox and messagebox templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk| 317,000+ }} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Dmbox/styles.css}} {{Mbox templates (small)}} This is the {{tl|Dmbox}} (['''D''']isambiguation footer ['''m''']essage ['''box''']) [[WP:MTM|metatemplate]]. It is used to build [[WP:disambiguation|disambiguation]] and [[Wikipedia:set index article|set index article]] message boxes, such as {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Ship index}}. This template works similarly to {{tl|Ambox}} and mostly uses the same parameters. The main differences are that this box uses the disambiguation style and only has two "type" settings. === Usage === Simple usage example: {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} {{dmbox | type = setindex | text = Some text.}} Complex example: {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg|class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | image = [[File:Schooner.svg||class=skin-invert-image|30px|link=|alt=]] [[File:DAB list gray.svg|30px|alt=Disambiguation icon]] | text = The message body text. }} Some other parameter combinations: {{dmbox | text = No type and no image given ('''default''') }} {{dmbox | image = none | text = No type and '''image=none''' – No image is used and the '''text''' uses the whole message box area. }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = type = setindex
imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] }} {{dmbox | type = setindex | imageright = [[File:Schooner.svg|33px|link=|alt=]] | text = This article includes a [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Ships/Guidelines#Index pages|list of ships]] with the same or similar names. If an [[Special:Whatlinkshere/{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|internal link]] for a specific ship referred you to this page, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended ship article, if one exists. }} === Parameters === List of all parameters: {{dmbox | type = disambig / setindex | image = none / [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | imageright = [[File:Some image.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | text = The message body text. | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} / true }} {{Para|type}} :If no {{Para|type}} parameter is given the template defaults to type {{code|disambig}}. :{{code|disambig}} = Makes it so the {{tl|disambig editintro}} is displayed when editing a page with this template on. (Means that this template internally sets the CSS id "disambigbox". The id is used by the javascript in [[MediaWiki:Common.js]] to determine if a page is a disambiguation page or not.) And adds [[:Category:All disambiguation pages]] and [[:Category:All article disambiguation pages]]. :{{code|setindex}} = Does ''not'' trigger the {{tl|disambig editintro}} when editing a page. (Because this instead sets the CSS id "setindexbox".) And adds [[:Category:All set index articles]]. {{Para|nocat}} :{{code|true}} = [[Wikipedia:Category suppression|Stops this template from categorizing]]. Useful for tests and demonstrations. Dmbox templates should forward{{when defined as}} {{para|nocat}}, so they too have the option to suppress categories. Thus, it is recommended that Dmbox templates always add something similar to this: ::nocat = {{{nocat|}}} {{Para|image}} :''[No parameter]'' = If no {{Para|image}} parameter is given, the template uses the default {{para|disambig}} or {{para|setindex}} image, depending on the {{Para|type}} parameter. :''An image'' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::image = [[File:Schooner.svg|30px|link=|alt=]] :none = Means that no image is used. {{Para|imageright}} :'''No parameter''' = If no {{Para|imageright}} parameter is given then no image is shown on the right side. :'''An image''' = Should be an image with usual wiki notation. 30px - 50px width are usually about right depending on the image height to width ratio. (Keep the width small; images in this template do not automatically shrink on mobile devices.) For example: ::imageright = [[File:Nuvola apps bookcase.png|40px|alt=Books icon]] :'''Anything''' = Any other object that you want to show on the right side. {{Para|text}} :The message body text. This message box has ''italic'' text as default, thus no need to manually set that. === Technical details === If you need to use special characters in the text parameter then you need to escape them like this: {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} {{dmbox | text =
Equal sign = and a start and end brace { } work fine as they are. But here is a pipe {{!}} and two end braces }}. And now a pipe and end braces |}}.
}} For more technical details see the [[Template talk:Dmbox|talk page]]. Since this template works almost exactly like {{tl|ambox}}, {{tl|tmbox}}, {{tl|imbox}}, {{tl|cmbox}} and {{tl|ombox}} their talk pages and related pages might also contain more details. ===See also=== {{Mbox templates see also}} Other pages: * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]], which includes a section explaining [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation#Set index articles|set index articles]]. * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Disambiguation]] * {{tl|Disambiguation}}, the generic disambiguation message box. * {{tl|Set index article}}, the generic set index article message box. {{Sandbox other| | }} [[Category:Disambiguation message boxes| ]] [[Category:Set index article templates| ]] [[Category:Mbox and messagebox templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
